---
pagetitle: "neuroim"
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}

::: {.hero-copy}
[Python neuroimaging API]{.eyebrow}

# Spatially safe neuroimaging, without ceremony.

[Typed volumes, voxel-series containers, and provenance receipts that keep analyses honest across in-memory, file-backed, and derived-data workflows.]{.lead}

[Start here →](start/01-image.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[API reference](reference/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
[Read the spec](spec/receipt-nifti-extension.html){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

[Spatial contracts]{.kicker} [Recoverable provenance]{.kicker} [One protocol]{.kicker}
:::

::: {.hero-code}
::: {.code-card}
[quickstart.py]{.code-card-title}

```python
import neuroim as ni

bold = ni.read_image("bold.nii.gz")
mask = ni.read_image("mask.nii.gz", type="vol")

# Refuses mismatched spatial frames early
bold.space.compatible_with(mask.space)

roi = ni.spherical_roi(mask, centroid=(42, 54, 38), radius=6)
result = bold.series_roi(roi)

result.values.shape
result.provenance.method_name
```
:::
:::

:::

::: {.routed-pointer}
Coming from nibabel or nilearn? [See the evidence →](evidence/index.qmd)
:::

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
import sys
from pathlib import Path

cwd = Path.cwd()
for cand in (cwd, *cwd.parents):
    inc = cand / "_includes" / "evidence_scan.py"
    if inc.exists():
        sys.path.insert(0, str(inc.parent))
        break
from evidence_scan import find_repo, scenario_rows

rows = scenario_rows(find_repo(cwd))
print(
    "::: {.evidence-teaser}\n"
    f"**{len(rows)} worked scenarios**, each a real task run both ways "
    "and checked at build time — "
    "[see the evidence →](evidence/index.qmd).\n"
    ":::"
)
```

## In 30 seconds

A masked temporal-SNR map, start to finish. You read a BOLD and a mask, compute the map, and the result already knows the image and mask it came from — and still knows after a save/reload through a `.nii.gz`. The frame check that would otherwise be a line you have to remember is just part of the call.

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd().parent / "src"))

import neuroim as ni

repo = Path.cwd().parent if Path.cwd().name == "docs" else Path.cwd()
bold = ni.read_image(str(repo / "golden_tests/fixtures/tiny_bold.nii.gz"))
mask = ni.read_image(str(repo / "golden_tests/fixtures/tiny_mask.nii.gz"), type="vol")

tsnr = bold.temporal_snr(mask=mask)
(tsnr.shape,
 tsnr.provenance.method_name,
 tsnr.provenance.input_space_hash[:12],
 tsnr.provenance.mask_hash[:12])
```

After `nib.save(tsnr.to_nibabel(), "tsnr.nii.gz")`, a fresh process calling `ni.read_image("tsnr.nii.gz")` returns a `DenseNeuroVol` with `.provenance` rehydrated from the NIfTI extension. No sidecar JSON. No hand-curated manifest. The [round-trip page](start/05-roundtrip.qmd) shows the full pattern.

## Three promises {.promise-heading}

::: {.promise-grid}

::: {.promise-card}
#### Contracts at the surface

Public operations check spatial inputs before returning a value, so shape, affine, and mask mistakes fail right at the call instead of one reduction later — with a consistent, searchable error message. See [contract failures](concepts/contract-failures.qmd).

[`bold.series_roi(roi)`]{.promise-tag}
:::

::: {.promise-card}
#### Receipts that travel

Typed results carry a content-addressable `Receipt`. `to_nibabel()` embeds it as a NIfTI `comment` extension and `read_image()` rehydrates it — recoverable with [ten lines of `nibabel`](spec/receipt-nifti-extension.html), no sidecar.

[`result.provenance`]{.promise-tag}
:::

::: {.promise-card}
#### One voxel protocol

Dense, sparse, memory-mapped, and file-backed 4-D containers answer the same calls. Analysis code is identical whether the data is in RAM, on disk, or one volume per file — a [public conformance contract](concepts/voxel-series-store.qmd).

[`series_roi · temporal_snr`]{.promise-tag}
:::

:::

## How to read these docs

- **[Start](start/01-image.qmd)** — a five-page on-ramp, each page centered on one practical task. About thirty minutes end-to-end.
- **[Concepts](concepts/index.qmd)** — the vocabulary, one page per idea. What each object *is*, what it guarantees, what it refuses.
- **[Cookbook](cookbook/index.qmd)** — task-driven recipes, each with the trapdoors that the contracts close.
- **[Spec](spec/receipt-nifti-extension.html)** — public contracts written so a third party could implement against them without importing neuroim.
- **[Reference](reference/index.qmd)** — generated API surface, grouped by task.

Every claim above is backed by a runnable scenario. The [Evidence](evidence/index.qmd) page is rebuilt from those scenarios each time the docs are built, so it stays in step with the code.
